title: ppt-master Theme
description: Color token bundle used by Strategist / Executor / svg_quality_checker to keep SVG output WCAG-compliant. Every theme declares semantic tokens (bg-canvas, text-primary, ...) plus pre-computed contrast ratios and a WCAG threshold block. Ratios are derived from the WCAG 2.1 relative-luminance formula and are authoritative at the time 'verified_at' was stamped — re-run validate_theme.py after any color edit.

id.description: kebab-case identifier; doubles as filename stem (e.g. 'dark-frost').

kind.description: Overall luminance class. Drives which bg-surface shade is preferred and which accent saturation is allowed.

version.description: SemVer. Bump major on token-removal or ratio-regression; minor on token-add.

description.description: One-line human-readable rationale (e.g. 'Cool tech keynote — black canvas, ice-blue accent').

fill-card.description: Lighter card fill for layered composition.

stroke-divider.description: Hairline dividers. May be < 3:1 against bg-canvas (decorative only).

ratios.description: Pre-computed WCAG contrast ratios. Keys MUST match '{token-fg}/bg-canvas' for the corresponding tokens. Validator re-computes and compares; tolerance ±0.2 (floating point + rounding).

min_text_ratio.description: WCAG 2.1 AA minimum for body text.

min_stroke_ratio.description: WCAG 2.1 AA minimum for non-text UI components.

verified_at.description: ISO date when ratios were last re-computed by validate_theme.py.
